title: Advanced Mobility Mechanics
description: Advanced mobility like crawling, climbing, and double jumping
body:
Advanced Mobility Mechanics adds new mobility mechanics to minecraft.
These include:
- Climbing fences, bamboo, chains, rods, and more!
- Double jumping
- Crawling

To Double jump, jump into the air and sneak and jump again. (JUMP -> SNEAK -> JUMP)
Double jumping will also negate fall damage as long as you land of the same Y-Level

To Crawl, look at a 1 block cavity (must be at your feet level and have a block above it) and then sneak and move forward.

You can also climb out of blocks such as sand and powder snow.

These features can be disabled by running `/trigger amm.disable_crawling` or `/trigger amm.disable_double_jump`.
